info.description: REST API for managing Users, Groups, and Organizations with RBAC support
info.title: KitaManager API

get.description: Get a paginated list of all government fundings

post.description: Create a new government funding (superadmin only)

get.description: Get a single government funding by its ID with nested periods and properties

parameters.description: Limit number of periods returned (0 = all, default 1 for latest only)
parameters.name: periods_limit

parameters.description: Filter periods active on date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)
parameters.name: active_on

put.description: Update an existing government funding by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a government funding by ID (superadmin only)

post.description: Create a new period for a government funding (superadmin only)

put.description: Update an existing period by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a period by ID (superadmin only)

post.description: Create a new property for a period (superadmin only)

put.description: Update an existing property by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a property by ID (superadmin only)

get.description: Check the health status of the API and its dependencies
Check if the API process is alive

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token
Clear authentication cookies to log out the user

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user based on the JWT token

Get a paginated list of organizations the user has access to.
Superadmins see all organizations; other users see only organizations they belong to via group membership.

parameters.description: Filter by active contract date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

parameters.description: Search by first or last name (case-insensitive)

Get attendance summary (present, absent, sick, vacation counts) for a date

parameters.description: Date for calculation (YYYY-MM-DD format, defaults to today)
parameters.name: date

parameters.description: Date for calculation (YYYY-MM-DD format, defaults to today)
parameters.name: date

get.description: Get children contract counts per month for the specified year range
get.summary: Get children contract count by month

get.description: Get a single child by their ID

put.description: Update an existing child by ID

get.description: Get attendance records for a specific child in a date range

post.description: Create a new attendance record for a child (present, absent, sick, or vacation)

409.description: Record already exists for this date

get.description: Get a single attendance record by ID for a specific child

put.description: Update an existing attendance record for a specific child

delete.description: Delete an attendance record by ID for a specific child

get.description: Get paginated contracts for a child

post.description:
Create a new contract for a child.

**Contract Date Rules:**
- Both `from` and `to` dates are inclusive (the contract is active on both dates)
- Same-day contracts are allowed (`from` == `to`)
- Contracts must not overlap with existing contracts
- "Touching" contracts (where contract A ends on the same day contract B starts) are considered overlapping
- To transition between contracts, the new contract must start the day AFTER the previous one ends

**Example:** If contract A ends on 2025-01-31, contract B must start on 2025-02-01 or later.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., from date after to date)

get.description: Get the currently active contract for a child
Get a single contract by ID

put.description:
Update an existing contract by ID. The same date rules apply as for creation:
both dates are inclusive, same-day contracts allowed, no overlapping contracts.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., from date after to date)

409.description: Updated dates would overlap with another contract

parameters.description: Filter by active contract date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)
parameters.name: active_on

parameters.description: Search by first or last name (case-insensitive)
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by staff category (qualified, supplementary, non_pedagogical)
parameters.name: staff_category

post.description: Create a new employee in the specified organization

get.description: Returns employees eligible for step promotions based on years of service

parameters.description: Date for calculation (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)
parameters.name: date

get.description: Get a single employee by their ID

put.description: Update an existing employee by ID

get.description: Get paginated contracts for an employee

post.description:
Create a new contract for an employee.

**Contract Date Rules:**
- Both `from` and `to` dates are inclusive (the contract is active on both dates)
- Same-day contracts are allowed (`from` == `to`)
- Contracts must not overlap with existing contracts
- "Touching" contracts (where contract A ends on the same day contract B starts) are considered overlapping
- To transition between contracts, the new contract must start the day AFTER the previous one ends

**Example:** If contract A ends on 2025-01-31, contract B must start on 2025-02-01 or later.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., from date after to date)

get.description: Get the currently active contract for an employee
Get a single contract by ID with properties

put.description:
Update an existing contract by ID. The same date rules apply as for creation:
both dates are inclusive, same-day contracts allowed, no overlapping contracts.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., from date after to date)

409.description: Updated dates would overlap with another contract

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
